strengths: Clear and concise professional summary that sets expectations for an entry-level candidate
Relevant technical skills listed including Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and React
Honest representation of current education status without overstating experience
weaknesses: No work experience, internships, or placements listed which is critical for any engineering role
Skills section lacks depth with no proficiency levels, frameworks, tools, or version control mentioned
No projects or portfolio work demonstrated to back up claimed technical skills
missing: Personal or academic projects with descriptions and links
Tools and technologies such as Git, GitHub, VS Code, or databases
Certifications or online courses to supplement formal education
summary: This CV is extremely thin for a Software Engineer role and currently reads more as a student profile than a professional application. To be competitive, Godwin must urgently add personal projects, GitHub links, and any practical experience to demonstrate real-world coding ability beyond listed skills.
